shorts.hook: Toxic resilience is keeping you stuck
shorts.content: Toxic resilience means wearing burnout as a badge of honor instead of recognizing it as a signal for change. We've been taught that pushing through is strength, but what if regeneration is more powerful? Regeneration allows things to break so you can build something better.
shorts.title: Why Your 'Resilience' Is Actually Toxic

shorts.content: Leadership isn't rocket science—it's neuroscience. You need to understand how your people are wired to lead them effectively. When you understand the brain, you understand behavior, and that's where real leadership transformation happens.
shorts.title: The Science of Leadership No One Talks About

shorts.hook: Your childhood is running your leadership
shorts.content: Your childhood survival strategies may be running your adult leadership in ways that no longer serve you. The patterns you learned to survive as a child might be sabotaging your success as a leader. It's time to break those cycles.
shorts.title: How Your Childhood Is Sabotaging Your Leadership

shorts.hook: Women must lead the AI revolution
shorts.content: Women must be involved in creating AI technology because only we can automate the invisible labor we see and do. If we're not at the table when AI is built, it won't solve the problems we actually face every day.
shorts.title: Why Women MUST Lead AI Development

titleOptions.curiosityGap: What Happens When You Stop Being 'Resilient'?
titleOptions.boldStatement: Your 'Strength' Is Actually Keeping You Weak
titleOptions.numberBased: 5 Signs Your Resilience Is Actually Toxic

description:
What if the resilience you've been praised for is actually keeping you trapped? 🤔

Dr. Katie Pritchett reveals why women must stop wearing burnout as a badge of honor and start choosing regeneration instead.

⏰ TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 - Introduction to toxic resilience
5:42 - Why resilience becomes toxic
12:18 - The power of regeneration over resilience
18:30 - Leadership as neuroscience
25:15 - Women and the AI revolution
32:07 - Breaking generational leadership patterns
38:22 - Moving from information to transformation

🔥 KEY TAKEAWAYS:
• Toxic resilience = wearing burnout as a badge of honor
• Regeneration allows things to break so you can build better
• Leadership is neuroscience—understand how people are wired
• Women must be involved in creating AI technology
• Your childhood survival strategies may be sabotaging your adult leadership
• Break generational cycles by choosing to inherit healing, not pain
• Real transformation happens through experience, not just information

🎯 CONNECT WITH DR. KATIE PRITCHETT:
🔗 Website: https://drkatiepritchett.com/
🧠 Take Her Free Quiz: https://drkatiepritchett.com/pattern-quiz

📊 TAKE THE QUIZ: https://themanageher.com/blog/dr-katie-pritchett-toxic-resilience-why-women-must-lead-the-ai-revolution

📝 FULL SHOW NOTES: https://themanageher.com/blog/dr-katie-pritchett-toxic-resilience-why-women-must-lead-the-ai-revolution

🎧 LISTEN TO THE FULL EPISODE: Wherever you get your podcasts - search "The Manage Her Podcast"

💌 SUBSCRIBE for weekly leadership insights for women who manage people, projects, and possibilities.

#ToxicResilience #WomenLeaders #Leadership #Burnout #Regeneration #AI #WomenInTech #LeadershipDevelopment #TheManageHer #Neuroscience

communityPosts.content:
Which resonates more with your leadership journey right now? 🤔

A) "I need to be more resilient and push through"
B) "I need to regenerate and build something better"

Dr. Katie Pritchett just dropped some truth bombs about why toxic resilience might be keeping us stuck. The idea that we should wear burnout as a badge of honor? It's time to challenge that. 

Comment below: What would regeneration look like in YOUR leadership? 👇

#Leadership #ToxicResilience #WomenLeaders

"I don't want him to inherit my pain—I want him to inherit my healing." 💕

This quote from Dr. Katie Pritchett in our latest episode hit me right in the heart. As leaders, we have the power to break generational cycles—not just in our families, but in our teams and organizations.

What healing are you choosing to pass on instead of pain? Share your thoughts below 👇

Watch the full episode: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cIdU6Qf2uDU

#GenerationalHealing #Leadership #WomenLeaders #TheManageHer
